reason: Test conventions (anti-patterns: hardcoded counts, tautological tests, type-checks in TS). Checker validates new tests for resolvePlaceholdersNeutral / configurator changes follow these.
Patterns for full configurator-flow tests (init/update integration). Needed because Gemini configurator change must be re-validated end-to-end, not just unit-level.
How to fake fs / cwd for configurator tests without flakiness. Relevant to verifying skills now land in .agents/skills/ instead of .gemini/skills/.
Lint, type-check, test coverage gates the checker enforces.
Cross-check: did the Gemini configurator change keep parity with platform-integration.md (e.g., still ships per-turn breadcrumb hook, still respects .agents/skills/ precedence)?
Cross-check: hookEventName branching in inject-workflow-state.py still complies with the breadcrumb output contract.
Authoritative source for verifying the BeforeAgent JSON shape matches what Gemini 0.40.x expects (avoid silent mis-injection).
Confirm checker that .agents/skills/ destination + frontmatter shape works with Gemini 0.40.x merge logic (no duplicate-skill warning).
Acceptance Criteria + Definition of Done — what 'pass' means for this task.
